## Procedural (generated at runtime — no files needed)

- 8 theme tilesets × 10 tile kinds (32px canvases)
- Player walk sprites (4 dir × 2 frames), 10 NPC archetypes, item sparkle, boss aura
- All 50 creature sprites (deterministic seeded pixel art + shiny palettes)
- Full music score (per-region WebAudio synth themes) + 14 SFX

## Drop-in upgrade slots (optional files, auto-detected at these exact paths)

**Creatures** — `public/assets/creatures/<speciesId>.png` (transparent cutout), 45 remaining species; ids in [CREATURE_DATABASE.md](CREATURE_DATABASE.md).

**Audio** — `public/assets/audio/`:
```
music/   bgm-village.mp3 bgm-forest.mp3 bgm-cave.mp3 bgm-desert.mp3 bgm-snow.mp3
         bgm-plateau.mp3 bgm-temple.mp3 bgm-city.mp3 bgm-battle.mp3 bgm-boss.mp3 bgm-menu.mp3
ambient/ amb-forest.mp3 amb-cave.mp3 amb-wind.mp3 amb-city.mp3
battle/  sfx-hit.mp3 sfx-crit.mp3 sfx-heal.mp3 sfx-faint.mp3
         sfx-capture-shake.mp3 sfx-capture-success.mp3 sfx-capture-fail.mp3
ui/      sfx-click.mp3 sfx-confirm.mp3 sfx-cancel.mp3 sfx-levelup.mp3
```

**Backgrounds** — 7 more battle backdrops (one per region theme), prompts in [HIGGSFIELD_PROMPTS.md](HIGGSFIELD_PROMPTS.md) §9.
